prompt: Generate work package files from tasks.md using /spec-kitty.tasks-packages
Run spec-kitty.tasks-packages to create the WP*.md prompt files in the tasks/ directory
Create WP01-slug.md and WP02-slug.md prompt files from the work package definitions in tasks.md
Generate the tasks.md outline and work package breakdown using spec-kitty.tasks
Start implementing a work package with spec-kitty implement WP01
Run spec-kitty.plan to generate a plan for this feature
